title: SenML sensor profiles — standard names and units
description: Implement lichen/senml/profiles.py: helper functions for standard LICHEN sensor profiles. Needs: location(lat, lon, alt) -> list[SenmlRecord] with unit 'deg'/'m'; battery(voltage_v, pct) -> list[SenmlRecord] with unit 'V'/'%EL'; temperature(celsius) -> SenmlRecord unit 'Cel'; humidity(pct) -> SenmlRecord unit '%RH'; pressure(pa) -> SenmlRecord unit 'Pa'. Each returns properly named SenML records ready to pack.
close_reason: SenML codec, profiles, and observable resources implemented; all tests passing
